name: Abominable
effect:
Static
Keywords - Innate
Effect: The user adds +5 Points to their HP Stat in the Extras Column. When the user reaches Level 20 and every interval after that (20, 40, etc) they gain an additional +5. If the user is a Trainer, the Level Intervals are Level 4, 8, 12, 16, then 20. If desired, the user can increase their size to Large.

name: Absorb Force
effect:
Scene x2 - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a Physical Attack while they have Temporary Hit Points
Effect: Before Damage Calculations, your Temporary Hit Points becomes double its current value. After the Attack resolves, you lose all Temporary Hit Points and become Vulnerable until the end of the Round.
Bonus: Whenever you take Damage from an Attack you applied no Temporary Hit Points towards, you may gain a Tick of Temporary Hit points after Damage Resolution.

name: Accelerate
effect:
Static
Effect: Attacks in which the user applies the Same Type Attack Bonus gain the Priority Keyword. When using an Attack this way, the user may use Speed as an Offensive Stat or may add half of their Speed to the Damage Roll.

name: Adaptability
effect:
Static
Effect: The user’s Normal Type Attacks may deal Damage as if they matched one of the user’s Types or an Adjacent Ally’s Type.

name: Aerial Fighter
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a Damaging Attack
Effect: The Triggering Attack is resisted by one additional damage step, if the Triggering Attack was from an Enemy with the Flier capability, it instead misses. 
Bonus: While the weather is Windy, the user has a bonus to Accuracy equal to their Tier Level.

name: Aftermath
effect:
Scene - Free Action
Trigger - The user Faints
Effect: At the end of the Round, all Enemies within a Burst 2 Range lose X Ticks of Hit Points. X is equal to 1 plus your Explosion Counters.
Bonus: At the end of each Round and as a Swift Action, the user gains +1 Explosion Counter (Max 5). As a Full Action, the user may activate this Ability, ignoring the Trigger and Frequency, but you lose all Explosion Counters after its resolution.

name: Alacrity
effect:
Static
Keywords - Innate
Effect: The user adds +5 Points to their Speed Stat in the Extras Column. When the user reaches Level 20 and every interval after that (20, 40, etc) they gain an additional +5. If the user is a Trainer, the Level Intervals are Level 4, 8, 12, 16, then 20. The user has a bonus to Accuracy equal to half of their Speed Evasion (Rounded Up).

name: Ambush
effect:
Static
Effect: During the first round of Combat, the user’s Attacks have the Unstoppable Keyword and treat Enemies as if they were Vulnerable. At the GM's Discretion, if the Enemies are unaware of the user’s presence, they gain a modifier to Critical Hit equal to their Tier Level. Whenever the user Targets a Flanked Enemy, they are instead treated as Vulnerable.

name: Analytic
effect:
Static
Effect: Targets of the User’s Attacks cannot apply Stat Evasion if they’ve used an Attack or Reaction this Round. Once per Round the User may use a Reaction as if it were a Free Action.

name: Anchored
effect:
Static
Keywords - Innate
Effect: The user gains an Anchor Token that cannot exceed 3m from the user and the user cannot exceed 3m from the Anchor Token. The user cannot be slid and if the user uses a Movement Action, their Anchor Token must move to any space within 3m of them. The user may originate any Damaging Attack from their Anchor Token and if they do, it turns into Melee, 1 Target, becomes Physical Category and may be shifted to deal Steel Type Damage. Attacks originating from your Anchor Token have their DB increased by +3.

name: Anger Point
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - The user drops below 50% Hit Points or is hit by a Critical Hit
Effect: The user becomes Enraged. 
Bonus: While the user is Enraged, they gain a bonus to Damage Rolls equal to their Tier Value and a modifier to Critical Hit equal to their Tier Level

name: Aqua Bullet
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Connection - Aqua Jet. 
Effect: Declare a Water Type Melee Damaging Attack. During this Turn, you do not provoke Attacks of Opportunity from Movement but you must use the declared Attack. The declared Attack may use Speed as if it were the Offensive Stat.
Bonus: The user may use non-Self Water Type Attacks as if their Range were 10, 1 Target.

name: Arena Trap
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Connection - Sinkhole
Effect: Create a Sinking Hazards in a 3x3 Range within 3m of the user. (Refer to Sinkhole). 
Bonus: While you are standing in a Sinking Hazard created by you, all Enemies within 3m that are also standing on a Sinking Hazard become Trapped by you.

name: Aroma Veil
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user and Allies within 2m cannot become Dazed, Enraged or Suppressed and are cured of these Afflicitons if they enter this Range. The user and Allies within 2m have a bonus to Save Checks equal to your Tier Level.

name: Aura Surge
effect:
Static
Effect: For each Tick of Hit Points the user is missing, the user gains a +5 Bonus to Damage Rolls. This Damage Bonus cannot exceed double the user’s Tier Value. While the user is below 50% of their Max Hit Points, their Damaging Attacks are treated as having the Smite Keyword.

name: Axe Cleaver
effect:
Scene x2  - Free Action
Trigger - You inflict the Wounded Affliction
Connection - Dual Chop.  The Target either loses -2 CS in Defense or cannot cure the Wounded Affliction during their next Save Check.
Bonus: The user gains a 17+ effect range to inflict Wounded on all Physical Attacks. The user's Wounded Effect Ranges (Excluding the one granted by Axe Cleaver) are increased by +2.

name: Battery
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action 
Trigger - The user uses an Electric Attack
Connection - Charge. 
Effect: The user gains a Charged Counter (Max 5). If the user is Tier 3, they instead gain two Charged Counters.
Bonus: The user’s Electric Type Attacks have a +1d8 Damage Bonus for each Charged Counter they have. As a Free Action, the user may Target an Adjacent Ally and expend any number of Charged Counters. The Target’s next Damaging Attack that hits has a +2d8 Damage Bonus for each expended Counter.

name: Battle Armor
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user cannot become Critically Hit. If they would, it instead becomes a normal hit. The user has Damage Reduction against Adjacent Attacks equal to their Tier Value.

name: Beam Cannon
effect:
Static
Effect: The user may use 1 Target, Ranged Attacks as if they were Line Range instead. If an Attack is 6, 1 Target, it becomes Line 6. The user gains a modifier to Critical Hit and Effect Ranges for their Line or 1 Target Ranged Attacks equal to their Tier Level.

name: Beast Boost
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - An Enemy that the user damaged since their last turn faints.
Effect: The user gains +2 CS to their highest Stat.  
Bonus: As a Swift Action, the user may lose any number of CS and gain a Tick of Temporary Hit Points for each 1 CS lost

name: Beautiful
effect:
Static
Effect: The user’s Attacks have a 17+ Effect Range to cause their Targets to become Entranced. While the user is within 2m of an Entranced Enemy, they cannot cure the Entranced Affliction with Save Checks. If an Ally would cause an Enemy to become Entranced, they may instead have you be the Fixation.

name: Berserk
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: The user becomes Enraged for the remainder of the Scene and it cannot be cured by any other means (Other than Fainting). 
Bonus: While Enraged, if the user hits a Damaging Attack, they gain +1 CS in Attack or Special Attack after Damage Calculations. While Enraged, the user’s Melee, 1 Target Attacks may be used as if they were “All Adjacent Enemies” instead. While Enraged, the user has a -3 Penalty to Save Checks.

name: Big Swallow
effect:
Static
Effect: The user may perform the Grapple Maneuver as a Swift Action. Whenever you are engaged in a Grapple with Creatures that are smaller than you, you are not Vulnerable nor Provoked by the Grappled Combatant. Whenever a Grappled Enemy you have Dominance with performs a Grapple Check, they lose a Tick of Hit Points and you restore a Tick of Hit Points.

name: Blade Of Resentment
effect:
Static
Connection - Bitter Blade. 
Effect: The user’s Melee Attacks have a 16+ Effect Range to cause Targets to become Suppressed. Whenever the user hits a Drain Attack against a Suppressed Target, they heal for the full Damage the Target takes instead of half.

name: Blessed Touch
effect:
At-Will  - Standard Action
Target - An Adjacent Ally
Effect: The Target is cured of all Physical Afflictions, restores 3 Ticks of Hit Points or gains 2 Ticks of Temporary Hit Points. An Ally can only be affected by each of these Effects once per Scene. 
Bonus: The user gains a Modifier to Save Checks equal to their Tier Level.

name: Blow Away
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - The user hits an Enemy with a Flying Type Attack or a Trip Maneuver
Effect: The Target is slid up to Xm in any direction. X is equal to 6 minus their Weight Class.
Bonus: The user may perform Trip Maneuvers as if their Range was 6, 1 Target or Line 3.

name: Bodyguard
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - An Adjacent Ally is hit by an Attack
Effect: The Triggering Ally Slides 1m in any direction, then the user slides into their original space. The user is hit by the Triggering Attack instead, taking damage from the Attack as if they resisted it one step further. If the Ally still remains within the Area of Effect of the Triggering Attack, they are still hit by the Attack.  
Bonus: Whenever the user Intercepts, the Triggering Attack isn't increased by a Damage Step.

name: Bone Lord
effect:
Static
Connection - Bone Club. 
Effect: Whenever you use the Bone Club Attack, you may alter how it’s used in any of the following ways. You can only choose one at a time. You may change its range to “All Adjacent Enemies”. You may change its range to “6, 1 Target, Smite”. You may have it ignore Immunity to Ground Type Attacks. You may extend its Critical Hit Range by your Tier Level. You may use it as an Interrupt, Standard Action when hit by an Adjacent Enemy.

name: Bountiful Harvest
effect:
Static
Effect: The user starts the Scene with 3 Fruit Counters. The user or Adjacent Allies may use a Swift Action to expend one Fruit Counter to restores two Ticks of Hit Points or cure themselves of a Physical Status Affliction.

name: Brimstone
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Trigger - The user would Burn or Poison an Enemy
Effect: They instead are both Burned and Poisoned.
Bonus: The user gains a bonus to Effect Ranges equal to their Tier Level if the Effect would cause a Target to become Burned or Poisoned.

name: Bulletproof
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a Physical Attack or 1-Target Ranged Attack
Effect: The user takes Damage as if the Triggering Attack was one step less effective. If the user is Tier 3, the Frequency of this Ability becomes Scene x2 instead.

name: Cave Dweller
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user resists Ground and Rock Type Attacks by an additional Damage step. The user gains the Darkvision Capability. While the user is in Cave Terrain, once per Round they may perform any Combat Maneuver without a Trigger as if it were a Free Action.

name: Chaotic
effect:
Scene x2 - Free Action
Trigger - You use Metronome as a Standard Action
Connection - Metronome. 
Effect: The GM rolls for Metronome three times and you may choose which Attack to use. 
Bonus: When you use the Metronome Attack, Damaging Attacks that are rolled may have their Category changed to either Physical or Special, of your choice.

name: Chemical Romance
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Trigger - The user would Poison an Enemy
Effect: The Poisoned Enemy also becomes Entranced. They cannot cure the Entranced Affliction while they’re Poisoned this way.
Bonus: Entranced Enemies within 3m of you suffer a penalty to Save Checks equal to your Tier Level.

name: Chlorophyll
effect:
Scene - Swift Action 
Effect: The user restores two Ticks of Hit Points or gains 2 Ticks of Temporary Hit Points or is cured of a Physical Status Affliction. If the user is in Sunny Weather, the Frequency of Chlorophyll isn’t expended. This Ability can only ignore its Frequency twice in a Scene.

name: Clay Cannons
effect:
Static
Effect: The user gains two Cannon Tokens that must stay within 2m of the user at all times. The user may move them anywhere within this range Limit as a Free Action on their Turn. Each Token has 1 HP and if they Faint, can be revived as a Swift Action. The user may originate any Attack or Maneuver from a Cannon Token. When originating an Attack from a Cannon Token, all Blast Ranges are increased by +1 and Line Ranges are increased by +2. These Attacks also gain +3d8 to their Damage Rolls.

name: Clear Body
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user cannot have Combat Stages lowered by the result of an Enemy’s Feature, Ability, Attack, etc. Indirect methods such as Status Afflictions still affect them. The user is Immune to negative modifiers as a result of an Enemy’s Feature, Ability, Attack, etc. This includes modifiers to Accuracy, Save Checks, Evasion, etc.

name: Cloud Nine
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: All Weather on the Field is removed. The same Weather cannot be added to the Field until end of the next Round.
Bonus: While there is no Weather on the Field, the user has a bonus to Save Checks equal to their Tier Level and has a Boon to all Skill Checks while in Combat.

name: Cluster Mind
effect:
Scene - Swift Action

Effect: The user may switch an Attack between their Known Attack List and their Attack List until the end of the Scene.
Bonus: The user gains bonus Attack Slots equal to their Tier Level. Attacks that occupy these Slots must be Status Category.

name: Color Change
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Effect: Choose any Type. The user’s Type changes to match the chosen Type until the end of the Scene. 
Bonus: The user resists Attacks of its current Type by an additional Damage Step.

name: Color Theory
effect:
At-Will - Free Action  
Trigger - The user hits a Damaging Attack
Effect: The user may instead deal Damage as if its Type was one of the Types associated with their Color. 
Bonus: When the user is born, choose a Color for their Tail. Each color has an associated set of Types and Stat. The user gains +5 Stat Points in the associated Stat that go in the Extra Column. Red - (Attack | Fire, Fairy, Psychic), Orange - (Defense | Normal, Fighting, Dragon) Yellow - (Special Attack | Electric, Rock, Steel) Green - (Special Defense | Bug, Grass Ground) Blue - (Speed | Flying, Ice, Water) Violet - (Hit Points | Dark, Ghost, Poison)

name: Comatose
effect:
At-Will - Movement Action
Effect: The user regains a Tick of Hit Points.
Bonus: The user is Immune to the Drowsy Affliction.

name: Combo Striker
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - The user rolls a Natural 5, 10, 15 or 20 on an Accuracy Roll for a Melee Damaging Attack
Effect: After the Triggering Attack Resolves, the user may use a Basic Attack against the same Target.

name: Commander
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Target - An Adjacent Ally
Connection - Helping Hand.
Effect: The Target gains a bonus to Accuracy and Save Checks equal to your Tier Level until the end of their next Turn. 
Bonus: The user treats all Allies as if they were Cover Terrain when Attacks would Target the user.

name: Complex Neurolink
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user is immune to Mental Afflictions caused by Enemies.

name: Compound Eyes
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user uses an attack 
Effect: The Triggering Attack gains the Unstoppable Keyword.
Bonus: The user gains a bonus to Accuracy and Evasion equal to their Tier Level.

name: Conqueror
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - An Enemy the user has Damaged this Scene Faints or the user resolves an Attack that resulted in a Critical Hit
Effect: The user gains +1 CS in Attack, Special Attack or Speed
Bonus: Whenever the user would lose CS in a Stat they have Positive CS in, the amount lost is reduced by 1.

name: Contrary
effect:
Static
Effect: Whenever the user would lose Combat Stages, they instead gain the same amount. If they gain CS, they instead lose the same amount. If the user would gain a temporary positive Modifier to a Combat Value, it instead becomes a Penalty of the same Value. If the user would gain a temporary penalty to a Combat Value, it instead becomes a positive Modifier for the same Value for the same duration. (Ex: Accuracy or Evasion)

name: Copy Master
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - Another Combatant uses an Attack
Connection - Copycat. 
Effect: Add the Triggering Attack to your Attack List until the end of your next Turn. 
Bonus: Whenever you use Copycat, the Attack is added to your Attack List for the rest of the Scene. Whenever you use an Attack that has been added to your Attack List this Scene, it may be treated as either Physical or Special of your choice. Attacks gained through this Ability are added to your bonus Attack Slots.

name: Corrosion
effect:
Static
Effect: The user’s Poison Type Attacks deal Damage to Rock and Steel Type Pokemon as if it was Super Effective instead of Immune. The user may inflict the Poison Affliction on Steel Type Pokemon as if they were not Immune to the Affliction. When the user inflicts Poison, they may lower their Defense instead of Special Defense if desired.

name: Costar
effect:
Scene x2 - Reaction
Trigger - An Ally gains Combat Stages or a Temporary Modifier
Effect: The user gains CS in the same Stats for the same value or gains the same Modifier for the same duration. 
Bonus: When the user takes their Turn, if the Ally they’re acting alongside targets an Enemy with an Attack, that Enemy cannot apply Stat Evasion against your Attacks.

name: Cotton Plume
effect:
At-Will - Free Action 
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user uses a Grass Type Attack or is hit by an Attack from an Adjacent Enemy
Effect: Choose Accuracy or Evasion. All Enemies within 1m of the user have a penalty to the chosen combat value equal to your Tier Level until the end of their next Turn. An Enemy can only be affected by Cotton Plume once per Round.  
Bonus: This Ability may be used as a Swift Action to ignore the Trigger.

name: Courage
effect:
Static
Effect: While the user is below 50% Hit Points or Surrounded, they have a Bonus to Damage Rolls and Damage Reduction equal to their Tier Value. If both apply, the bonus is doubled.

name: Coward
effect:
Scene - Free Action
Trigger - The user is Targeted by an Attack
Effect: The Triggering Attack instead misses the user. The user cannot Target the Triggering Enemy with an Attack during their next Turn and if they use a Damaging Attack during this Turn, it is resisted by an additional damage step.
Bonus: Whenever the user ends their Turn without Targeting an Enemy with an Attack, they gain a bonus to Evasion equal to their Tier Level until the start of their next Turn.

name: Cruelty
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user hits an Enemy with a 1-Target Attack
Effect: Choose one of the following Effects to apply to the Target. A Target can only be affected by this Ability once per Scene. The user may use a Manipulate or Trick Maneuver against them as a Free Action. The Target has a Penalty to their next Save Check equal to double your Tier Level. The Target cannot restore Hit Points or gain Combat Stages until the end of the next Round.

name: Curious Medicine
effect:
At-Will-Special 
Target - The user or an Adjacent Combatant 
Effect: Curious Medicine may be used as a Free Action to reset all Negative CS of the Target to their Default Value. It may be used as a Swift Action to grant the Target a bonus to their next Save Check equal to your Tier Level. Lastly, it may be used as a Standard Action to make the Target gain the Wounded, Poisoned, or Paralyzed Affliction

name: Cursed Body
effect:
At-Will - Reaction 
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - An Enemy ends their Turn Adjacent to the user or hits them with an Attack while Adjacent to them

Effect: The Triggering Enemy either becomes Cursed, Suppressed or has the Triggering Attack disabled.

name: Cute Charm
effect:
Scene x3 - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - An Enemy ends their Turn within 2m of the user or hits them with an Attack while Adjacent to them
Effect: The Triggering Enemy either becomes Entranced, Weakened until the end of the Round or loses -2 CS in Attack and Special Attack. An Enemy can only be affected by Cute Charm once per Scene.

name: Cute Tears
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Target - An Enemy within 3m
Effect: Until the end of the Target’s next Turn, when Attacking the user or an ally within 2m of you, they have a penalty to Accuracy equal to your Tier Level and a penalty to Damage Rolls equal to your Tier Value.

name: Damp
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: If the user is Targeted by Burst, Line or Blast Attack, they resist it by an additional Damage Step. If the user ends their turn while the Weather is Rainy, they gain a Tick of Temporary Hit Points and restore a Tick of Hit Points.

name: Dancer
effect:
At-Will - Swift or Movement Action
Target - An Ally within 2m

Effect: The Target gains +1 CS in a Stat of your choice. A Combatant can only be Targeted by Dancer once per Round and Dancer can only be used once per Round unless you’re Tier 3.

name: Deadly Poison
effect:
Static
Effect: Whenever you inflict the Poisoned Affliction, it cannot be cured via Save Checks. Combatants Poisoned by you instead lose three Ticks of Hit Points instead of one when the Poisoned Affliction would activate its effects.

name: Deathly Aroma
effect:
Static
Effect: Whenever the user ends their Turn, all Enemies within 3m of them lose -1 CS in a Stat of your choice and adjacent Enemies cannot restore Hit Points until the end of their next Turn.

name: Decoy
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Connection - Follow Me. 
Effect: When this Ability is Activated, you may use Follow Me as a Free Action.
Bonus: The user has a bonus to Evasion equal to your Tier Level if the attacker is Provoked by you or Dazed.

name: Deep Sleep
effect:
Scene - Standard Action
Effect: The user becomes Drowsy, then if they do, they restore 5 Ticks of Hit Points. 
Bonus: When the user becomes Drowsy they may choose to gain a Sleep Coat which persists while they have the Drowsy Affliction. While they have a Sleep Coat, they cannot use Swift or Movement Actions, they resist all Attacks by an additional Damage Step and they restore two Ticks of HP at the end of their Turn.

name: Defiant
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - The user has their CS lowered by an Attack, Ability or Feature from a source other than themselves
Effect: The user gains +2 CS in Attack or Special Attack. Defiant may only be Triggered once per Round.

name: Defy Death
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - The user would faint and had more than 10% Hit Points
Effect: The user performs a Luck Roll. If they pass a DC 5, they are instead set to 1 Hit Point instead of fainting. Each time this Ability activates, increase the DC by +5.

name: Delayed Reaction
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - You would take Damage
Effect: You instead take no Damage. At the end of the Round, you lose Hit Points equal to the damage you should have taken when before using this Ability. This occurs even if the user is recalled.

name: Desert Weather
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user resists Ground and Fire Type Attacks by an additional Damage step. If the user ends their turn while the Weather is Sandstorm, they gain a Tick of Temporary Hit Points and restore a Tick of Hit Points.

name: Dig Away
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a non-Adjacent Attack
Effect: The Triggering Attack instead misses. The user is removed from the Scene and becomes Untargetable for this duration. At the start of the user’s next Turn, they enter the field in any unoccupied space where they could have moved to during their last turn. 
Bonus: Whenever the user uses the Burrower Capability, then uses a 1-Target Attack during that Turn, the Target cannot apply Speed Evasion against it.

name: Dire Spore
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Connection - Spore. 
Effect: The user creates Spore Hazards withiin a 3, Ranged Blast 2, area. Enemies that move through this Hazard become Paralyzed, Poisoned or Burned, of the user's choice. 
Bonus: Your Grass Type Status Attacks gain a 15+ Effect Range to inflict Poison.

name: Discipline
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Effect: The user is cured of a Status Affliction. This Ability cannot be activated on a Turn the user used a Damaging Attack and the user cannot use a Damaging Attack for the rest of this Turn after activating Discipline.

name: Disguise
effect:
Scene - Free Action
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a Damaging Attack
Effect: The Triggering Attack is resisted by an additional Step, then the user becomes Enraged.  
Bonus: While Enranged this way, the user has a bonus to Critical Hit Ranges equal to their Tier Level for their Dark and Ghost Type Damaging Attacks. If the user is now longer Enraged, as a Swift Action, the user may restore the Frequency of this Ability.

name: Dodge
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user starts the Scene with Dodge Counters equal to their Tier Level. A Dodge Counter can be expended as a Reaction to gain +3 Evasion against an Attack or to treat an Attack as if it didn't have the Smite Keyword. Multiple Counter can be expended against the same Attack if desired and may be done after seeing the Accuracy Roll.

name: Dream Smoke
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by an Attack from an Adjacent Enemy
Connection - Smokescreen. 
Effect: The Triggering Enemy becomes Drowsy. 
Bonus: When the user uses Smokescreen, Smoke Hazards created that way also cause Enemies to become Drowsy if they move through it or end their Turn in the Hazard.

name: Drizzle
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Effect: The Weather becomes Rainy. 
Bonus: While the Weather is Rainy, the user has a bonus to Save Checks equal to their Tier Level and has a Boon to all Skill Checks while in Combat.

name: Drought
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Effect: The Weather becomes Sunny. 
Bonus: While the Weather is Sunny, the user has a bonus to Save Checks equal to their Tier Level and has a Boon to all Skill Checks while in Combat.

name: Drown Out
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Trigger - The user uses an Attack with the Sonic Keyword
Effect: The Target gains a penalty to Accuracy equal to your Tier Level until the end of their next Turn. If they fail a Standard CR (2) Focus Check, they instead become Deafened. Deafened is a Physical Status Affliction that has the same Accuracy Penalty while they’re affected by the Affliction. If the user is Tier 3, it becomes a Tough CR (3) Focus Check instead. 
Bonus: The user’s Attacks with the Sonic Keyword gain the Smite Keyword against Enemies that are adjacent to you.

name: Dusk Body
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: The user restores two Ticks of Hit Points or gains 2 Ticks of Temporary Hit Points or is cured of a Physical Status Affliction. If the user is in Foggy Weather, the Frequency of Dusk Body isn’t expended. This Ability can only ignore its Frequency twice in a Scene.

name: Dust Cloud
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - You use a Bug, Ground, Grass or Poison Type Status Attack
Connection - Smokescreen. 
Effect: You create Smoke Hazards (Refer to Smokescreen) in a 3x3 Zone, centered on one of the Targets of the Triggering Attack.

name: Dusty Guard
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user uses a Ground or Rock Type Attack
Effect: The user gains a Tick of Temporary Hit Points or gains +1 CS in Defense or Special Defense.
Bonus: While the Weather is Sandstorm, Effect Ranges cannot Trigger if the user is a Target.

name: Early Bird
effect:
Static
Effect: The user may perform Save Checks to cure Afflictions at the start of their Turn instead of at the end (Before any Affliction Effects would occur). All Enemies who haven't acted yet this Round treat the user's Attacks as if they had the Unstoppable Keyword.

name: Earth Eater
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Keywords - Defensive
Target - Rough, Cover or Blocking Terrain that the user is Adjacent to or standing on
Effect: The Targeted Terrain changes to Basic Terrain. The user then restores two Ticks of Hit Points or gains +1 CS in Defense or Special Defense. The GM may decide if Terrain is able to be changed by this ability or not but not whether or not it can be Targeted. 
Bonus: The user is Immune to Ground Type Attacks.

name: Earthen Shell
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user falls below 50% Hit Points
Connection - Shell Smash. 
Effect: The user may use Shell Smash as a Free Action, then becomes Enraged.  
Bonus: When the user uses Shell Smash, they may choose to instead increase Defense and Special Defense by +3 CS instead of the attack’s listed stats.

name: Edged Leaf
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Trigger - The user hits a Grass Type Melee Attack
Effect: Targets hit by the Triggering Attack become Wounded.
Bonus: The user's Physical Melee Attacks have a 17+ Effect Range to inflict Wounded on all Targets. The user's Wounded Effect Ranges (Excluding the one granted by Edged Leaf) are increased by +2.

name: Effect Spore
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - An Enemy ends their Turn Adjacent to the user or hits them with an Attack while Adjacent to them
Effect: The Triggering Enemy must pass a Standard CR (2) Athletics Check or else they roll a d3. If the user is Tier 2, it becomes a Tough CR (3) Athletics Check. If the user is Tier 3, they also have a Bane to the Skill Check. When they roll the d3, on a 1, they become Poisoned. On a 2, they become Paralyzed. On a 3, they become Drowsy.

name: Eggscellence
effect:
Static
Connection - Barrage. 
Effect: When using Barrage or Egg Bomb, the user may use their HP Stat Value (Not Hit Points) as an Offensive Stat. On a 15+, these Attacks deal Damage as if it were one step more effective.

name: Electric Surge
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Connection - Electric Terrain. 
Effect: You may use Electric Terrain as a Free Action, however it only lasts until the end of the next Round. 
Bonus: At the end of the Round, if the Weather is Thunderstorm, you may use a Reaction to gain +1 CS in a Stat of your choice.

name: Electrodash
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Trigger - The user uses a Dash Attack
Effect: The Triggering Attack has a 17+ Effect Range to Paralyze all Targets and may be treated as if it were Electric Type. 
Bonus: While the Weather is Thunderstorm, the user has +3 to their Movement Value, cannot be Slowed and cannot trigger Attacks of Opportunity via movement.

name: Electromorphosis
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a Melee or Physical Attack
Effect: After Damage Resolution, note the amount of Damage taken by the user. This noted number is halved (Rounded Up) and added as Plasma Counters. 
Bonus: As a Swift Action when hitting an Electric Type Damaging Attack, you may expend any number of Plasma Counters the user has and add that as a Damage Modifier to the Attack’s Damage Calculations.

name: Emperor's Ego
effect:
Scene x2 - Reaction
Trigger - The user gains a Mental Affliction
Effect: The user gains +2 CS in a Stat of their Choice
Bonus: The user's Damaging Attacks are always treated as Super Effective against Ice Type Pokemon, ignoring Type Effectiveness.

name: Enduring Rage
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - The user drops below 50% Hit Points or is hit by a Critical Hit
Effect: The user becomes Enraged.  
Bonus: While the user is Enraged, they faint when they reach -25% of their Maximum Hit Points instead of 0. While the user is Enraged, they gain Damage Reduction equal to their Tier Value.

name: Energy Leech
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user hits an Attack on an Adjacent Enemy
Effect: The Triggering Attack is treated as having the Drain Keyword. The user then becomes Slowed. If the user is at Maximum Hit Points when Energy Leech is used, one Target that was hit by the Triggering Attack loses -2 CS in a chosen Stat, then the user gains +2 CS in the same Stat.

name: Enfeebling Lips
effect:
Static
Trigger - The user performs a Melee Attack or uses Lovely Kiss
Connection - Lovely Kiss. 
Effect: Choose a Stat. If the Triggering Attack hit, the Stat will be lowered by -1 CS. If the Attack was Status Category, it is instead lowered by -2 CS on a hit or -1 CS on a Miss. CS can only be lowered by this Ability once per Round.

name: Fabulous Trim
effect:
Static
Effect: Furfrou’s Ability depends on its current Hairstyle. It’s hairstyle may be changed as an Extended Action by someone with expertise in pokemon grooming such as a hair parlor. 

Dandy Trim - Analytic
Debutante Trim - Rally
Diamond Trim - Defiant
Heart Trim - Beautiful
Kabuki Trim - Inner Focus
La Reine Trim - Intimidate
Matron Trim - Friend Guard
Pharoah Trim - Regal Challenge
Star Trim - Run Away

name: Fade Away
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by an Attack from a non Adjacent Enemy
Effect: The Triggering Attack misses the user, then the user turns Invisible until the start of their next Turn. At the start of their Turn, the user may appear in any space within 3m of where they were when they turned invisible. 
Bonus: While the user is Invisible, they are Untargetable. If the Weather is Foggy, Fade Away may Trigger if the Attacking was from an Adjacent Enemy as well.

name: Fated Love
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Target - An Enemy within 3m
Effect: The user chooses one ally or themself. The Target becomes Entranced with the chosen Combatant as their Fixation. 
Bonus: While an Enemy is Entranced with the user as their Fixation, the effects of the affliction apply to them regardless if the user is within 3m of them.

name: Fiery Crash
effect:
Static
Effect: Whenever the user uses an Attack with the Dash keyword, they may either increase that Attack’s Damage Base by +2, or change the Attack to be Fire Type if it was not already. All Attacks with the Dash keyword performed as Fire Typed burn their target on 17+, or increase the effect range by +2 if they could already inflict Burn. The user ignores the Recoil Keyword on Fire Type Attacks.

name: Fiery Soul
effect:
Static
Effect: When the user enters the Field, they summon a Fiery Soul Token within an Adjacent Space. This Token cannot be Targeted, may move up to 5m as a Free Action on the user's Turn, and is removed from the Field when the user faints or is recalled. The user may originate Manipulate Maneuvers, Fire Type Attacks or Sonic Attacks from the space their Fiery Soul Token is in. If you or an Ally are adjacent to the Token, they have a bonus to Save Checks equal to your Tier Level.

name: Flame Body
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - An Enemy ends their Turn Adjacent to the user or hits them with an Attack while Adjacent to them
Effect: The Triggering Enemy either becomes Burned. If the Trigger was being hit with an Attack and the Triggering Enemy is already Burned, they cannot cure the Affliction during their next Save Check.

name: Flaming Shot
effect:
Scene x2 - Movement Action
Trigger - The user uses a Fire Type Attack with the Line Range
Effect: Instead of the Attack being a straight line, at any point in the Line, it can shift one space off the straight line, then it must continue straight the rest of the range.
Bonus: If the user has higher Speed than a Target of its Fire Type Damaging Attack, they cannot apply Speed Evasion against it. The user may use Fire Type Damaging Attacks as if their Range was Line 6

name: Flaming Wrath
effect:
Static
Effect: For each Tick of Hit Points the user is missing, the user gains a +5 Bonus to Damage Rolls for Fire Type Attacks. This Damage Bonus cannot exceed double the user’s Tier Value. While the user is below 50% of their Max Hit Points, their Damaging Attacks ignore the Recoil Keyword.

name: Flames of Justice
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user uses a Fire or Psychic Type Attack with a range of X, 1 Target
Connection - Armor Cannon. 
Effect: The Triggering Attack’s Range is changed to Line X, where X is the meters of the original Range. You may instead change the Range to Close Blast Y, Smite, but may only do so once per Scene and the user becomes Vulnerable Attack Resolution until the end of the next Round. Y is equal to half the Value of X rounded down.

name: Flavorful Aroma
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Effect: Choose one of the following Aroma Scents. Sweet, Spicy, Floral, Fruity. The modifier of this Ability’s Bonus Effect is dependent on the chosen Scent. If it is Sweet, the Modifier is to Effect Ranges. If it is Spicy, the Modifier is to Critical Hit Range. If it is Floral, it is to Save Checks. If it is Fruity, it is to Accuracy Rolls. 
Bonus: The user and all allies within 3m have a Modifier to a Combat Value depending on the user’s current Aroma Scent equal to your Tier Level. As an Extended Action you may choose a Scent to start the Scene with.

name: Floral Bloom
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: The user may only use Floral Bloom if the Weather is Sunny or they’re below 50% Hit Points. When Activated, choose two Stats. You gain +2 CS to the chosen Stats and all Allies within 3m of you gain +1 CS in the chosen Stats. You may also choose HP and if you do, you gain 3 Ticks of Temporary Hit Points and Allies gain 2 Ticks of Temporary Hit Points.
Bonus: While the Weather is Sunny, Grass Type Attacks you have are treated as having the Priority (Limited) Keyword.

name: Flower Power
effect:
Static
Effect: The user may perform damaging Grass Type Attacks as if they were their choice of either Physical or Special. If the Weather is Sunny, the user’s Grass Type Damaging Attacks cannot be resisted by Type Effectiveness.

name: Flower Veil
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user and Allies within 2m cannot have their Combat Stages lowered by any source other than themselves. If the Weather is Sunny, the user and Allies within this range have a bonus to Evasion equal to your Tier Level.

name: Fluffy
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user resists Melee Attacks by an additional Damage Step. The user is considered to be Weak against Fire Type Attacks, ignoring Type Effectiveness. The user cannot cure the Burn Affliction through Save Checks. If the user would already be weak to Fire Type Attacks, they cannot apply Evasion against them.

name: Fluffy Charge
effect:
Scene - Movement Action
Trigger - The user uses a self-targeting Attack or an Electric Status Attack that is not Charge
Connection - Charge. 
Effect: You may use Charge as a Free Action, frequency permitting. You may use either the Versatile Effect or the normal Effect. If you use the Versatile Effect, Fluffy Charge’s Frequency isn’t expended.
Bonus: When the user ends their Turn in Thunderstorm Weather, they restore a Tick of Hit Points.

name: Flying Fly Trap
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user is Immune to Bug and Ground Type Attacks. The user’s Melee Attacks are one step more Effective against Bug Type Pokemon (Max 1.5x Effectiveness).

name: Focused Membrane
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Target - An Enemy within 5m
Effect: Make a Perception or Intuition Check. Depending on the results, the user gains bonuses to their next Attack against the Target. An Enemy can only be affected this way once per Scene.
2+ Successes - They've Vulnerable against the Attack
4+ Successes - They cannot resist the Attack other than through Smite.
6+ Successes - If it is Damaging, it is automatically a Critical Hit

name: Forecast
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - An Attack with the Field Keyword is used
Effect: The user changes their Type to the Type of the Triggering Attack. 
Bonus: The user’s Normal Type Attacks may deal damage as if they were the user’s Type instead.

name: Forest Lord
effect:
Scene x3 - Movement Action
Effect: The user grows a Tree Hazard on one space within 8m of the user whose appearance is dependent on the terrain. The Tree is considered Large Blocking Terrain.
Bonus: The user may originate any Grass or Ghost Type Attacks or Tactic Maneuvers from a Tree within 8m of them. The user is considered to occupy all spaces their Tree Hazards are in.

name: Forewarn
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Target - An Enemy within 5m
Effect: The Attack with the highest Damage Base the Target has on their Attack List becomes Forewarned until the end of the Scene. When an Attack is Forewarned, it is communicated to the Players that it is on their Attack List. If an Enemy is Targeted multiple times, their next highest or a random Attack is Forewarned. Forewarn may only be used once per Round.
Bonus: You and Allies have a bonus to Evasion equal to your Tier Level against Forewarned Attacks. You may perform Analyze Maneuvers as a Free Action once per Round.

name: Fox Fire
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Connection - Will-O-Wisp. 
Effect: When this Ability is activated, the user must expend a Wisp Counter, then they may use a Fire or Ghost Type Status Attack as a Free Action. If they instead expend 3 Wisp Counters, the Frequency of this Ability isn't expended.
Bonus: Whenever the user uses a Fire or Ghost Type Attack as a Standard Action, they gain a Wisp Counter (Max 3) at the end of their Turn. On a 16+ on the qualifying Attack, they instead gain +2 Wisp Counters (This counts as an Effect Range).

name: Friend Guard
effect:
Scene x2 - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - An Adjacent Ally is hit by a Damaging Attack
Effect: They resist it by an additional damage step. 
Bonus: Allies that are adjacent to the user have Damage Reduction equal to your Tier Value while they’re adjacent to you. This cannot stack with other instances of Friend Guard.

name: Frostbite
effect:
Static
Effect: The user gains a bonus to Chilled Effect Ranges equal to their Tier Level (Excluding the one granted by Frostbite). The user’s Melee Attacks that do not have a Chilled Effect Range gain one at 18+. While an Enemy is Chilled by you and they’re hit by an Attack, they lose a Tick of Hit Points. An Enemy cannot lose more than 3 Ticks this way per Round.

name: Gale Surge
effect:
At-Will- Swift Action
Trigger - The user hits a Flying Attack
Effect: After the Triggering Attack is resolved, choose any number of Targets of the Triggering Attack to Slide up to 3m away from you.
Bonus: The user’s Flying Type Attacks have their Areas of Effect increased by +1. If it's 1-Target, they may instead be used as if they were Blast 2, if desired.

name: Gale Wings
effect:
Static
Effect: The user may perform Flying Type Attacks as if they had the Priority Keyword. While the Weather is Windy, the user cannot trigger Attacks of Opportunity or be Slowed.

name: Gentle Vibe
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: The user and all Allies within 3m may either cure a Mental Affliction or have their CS reset to their Default Values
Bonus: The user and adjacent allies have a bonus to Save Checks equal to your Tier Level if they’re suffering from a Mental Affliction.

name: Giver
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user uses Present
Connection - Present. 
Effect: If the user targeted an enemy, the DB is automatically 10 without rolling. If the user targeted an ally, they gain 3 additional Temporary Ticks of Hit Points

name: Good As Gold
effect:
Scene - Standard Action
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user gains a Golden Coat. While the user is affected by the Golden Coat, they are resistant to all Damage by an additional Damage Step. The Golden Coat is removed if the user is Critically Hit, hit by an Attack that would be Super Effective or drops below 50% Hit Points. 
Bonus: The user is Immune to Enemy Status Attacks.

name: Gooey
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is Targeted with an Attack by an Adjacent Enemy
Effect: The Triggering Enemy becomes Slowed and loses -2 CS in Speed. If they are already Slowed, they cannot cure it during their next Save Check.

name: Gore
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user hits an Enemy with the Wounded Affliction
Effect: The Wounded Affliction cannot be cured via Save Checks during their next Save Check, then the Target loses -2 CS in Defense. 
Bonus: The user’s Melee Attacks gain a 17+ Effect Range to cause their Targets to become Wounded.

name: Gorilla Tactics
effect:
Scene - Swift Action 
Effect: The user becomes Enraged and Suppressed and gains +2 CS in Attack or Special Attack. 
Bonus: The user adds a 1d6 Bonus to Damage Rolls for At-Will or Melee Attacks. For each ally that is adjacent to the user, they add an additional 1d6. If the user is Tier 3, these are increased to 2d6 instead.

name: Grass Pelt
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit with a Super Effective Attack
Effect: The Triggering Attack instead misses. After the Attack’s resolution, the user loses the Grass Type for the remainder of the Scene. If the user would have no Type after this, the user is treated as Normal Type. 
Bonus: While the user has the Grass Type or if the Weather is Sunny, the user has Damage Reduction equal to their Tier Value.

name: Grassy Surge
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Connection - Grassy Terrain. 
Effect: You may use Grassy Terrain as a Free Action, however it only lasts until the end of the next Round
Bonus: At the end of the Round, if the Weather is Sunny, you may use a Reaction to gain +1 CS in a Stat of your choice.

name: Guard Dog
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Keywords - Defensive
Target - An Ally within 5m
Effect: The Target becomes your Escort. You may only have one Escort at a time.
Bonus: While you are adjacent to your Escort, they cannot be Targeted by Ranged 1 Target Attacks. While Adjacent, if they were to be Targeted by any Attack, you may use a Reaction to become the Target instead, then you and the Escort slide into each other's spaces. Whenever your Escort moves, you may Slide into a space that is adjacent to them.

name: Guts
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - The user is hit by an Attack or gains a Physical Affliction
Effect: After the Trigger resolves, the user gains +1 CS in Attack or Defense.
Bonus: While the user has a Physical Affliction, they. have a bonus to Damage Rolls equal to their Tier Value.

name: Haunting Spirit
effect:
Scene - Free Action
Trigger - The user would Faint from a Damaging Attack
Effect: The Triggering Enemy becomes Cursed.   
Bonus: Enemies that are Cursed as a result of you gain the Haunted Condition while Cursed. Allies of an Haunted Enemy are treated as having the Cursed Affliction while they're within 2m of them.

name: Hay Fever
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Trigger - The user uses a Bug, Grass or Poison Type Attack
Effect: All Enemies within 2m lose a Tick of Hit Points for each Physical Affliction they're affected by.
Bonus: All Enemies without the Breathless Capability that end their Turn within 2m of the user lose a Tick of Hit Points and have a penalty to Save Checks equal to your Tier Level until the end of their Turn.

name: Healer
effect:
At-Will - Full Action
Target - An Adjacent Ally
Effect: Choose one Effect to apply to the Target. A Combatant can only be affected by each Effect of Healer once per Scene. The Target is cured of all Status Afflictions. The Target restores 5 Ticks of Hit Points. The Target may use the Respite Maneuver as a Free Action on their next Turn, ignoring its restrictions.

name: Healing Aroma
effect:
Scene - Standard Action
Target - An Adjacent Fainted Ally
Effect: The Target is revived and is set to 3 Ticks of Hit Points
Bonus: Allies that end their Turn adjacent to the user restore a Tick of Hit Points.

name: Heat Mirage
effect:
At-Will- Swift Action
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user uses a Fire Type Attack
Connection - Double Team
Effect: The user gains one activation of a Double Team Coat, as if they used the Attack with the Versatile Keyword. If the Triggering Attack was Status Category, instead gain two activations.
Bonus: While the Weather is Sunny, the user has a bonus to Evasion equal to their Tier Level.

name: Heliovolt
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user hits an Electric Attack, is hit by an Electric Attack or ends their Turn in Sunny Weather
Effect: If the Trigger was hitting an Attack, its Effect is replaced with, “The user gains +1 CS in Attack or Special Attack”. If the Trigger was being hit by an Electric Attack, the user takes no Damage and instead gains +1 CS in Attack or Special Attack. If the Trigger was Weather, the user gains +1 CS in Attack or Special Attack. Heliovolt can only be Triggered twice per Round.

name: Helper
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - The user chooses a single Allly as a Target for an Effect
Connection - Helping Hand. 
Effect: The Targeted Ally gains a bonus to Accuracy, Evasion or Save Checks of your choice equal to your Tier Level until the end of their next Turn.

name: High Voltage
effect:
Static
Effect: All of the user's Attacks with the Sonic Keyword gain an Effect Range of 15+ whose Effect differs based on the user's Form. If the user is in Amped Form, they gain +1 CS in a chosen Stat. If the user is in Low Key Form, all Targets of the used Attack lose -2 CS in a chosen Stat.

name: Huge Power
effect:
Static
Keywords - Innate
Effect: The user adds +5 Points to their Attack Stat in the Extras Column. This effect repeats whenever the user reaches Level 20 and every interval after that (20, 40, etc) . If the user is a Trainer, the Level Intervals are Level 4, 8, 12, 16 and 20. The user may use Special Category Attacks as if they were Physical. If they do, their Range is changed to Melee, 1 Target.

name: Hunger Switch
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Effect: Choose Full Belly Mode or Hangry Mode. The user enters this Mode until the end of the Scene or if this Ability is used again. Hunger Switch can only be used at the start of the user's Turn.
Bonus: While in Full Belly Mode, The user gains two Ticks of Temporary Hit Points at the end of their Turn. While in Hangry Mode, they become Enraged and have a bonus to Critical Hit Ranges equal to your Tier Level.

name: Hydration
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: The user is cured of a Status Affliction. If the user is in Rainy Weather or Ocean Terrain, the Frequency of Hydration isn’t expended. This Ability can only ignore its Frequency twice in a Scene.

name: Hyper Cutter
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user rolls a Natural 15+ on a Melee Damaging Attack
Effect: Choose an Effect to apply:
■ A Coat the Target is affected by is destroyed
■ The Triggering Attack has the Unstoppable Keyword
■ The Target loses -2 CS in Defense or Special Defense after Attack Resolution
Bonus: The user’s Attack CS cannot be lowered below their Default CS Value.

name: Hypnotic
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Trigger - You inflict the Drowsy Affliction
Connection - Hypnosis. 
Effect: Choose another Affliction below to apply to the Drowsy Enemy. When they become Cured of Drowsy, this Affliction is also removed. 
■ Dazed, Enraged, Entranced
Bonus: Whenever the user would inflict Drowsy, they may instead inflict any of the above Afflictions

name: Ice Body
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: The user restores two Ticks of Hit Points or gains 2 Ticks of Temporary Hit Points or is cured of a Physical Status Affliction. If the user is in Snowy Weather, the Frequency of Ice Body isn’t expended. This Ability can only ignore its Frequency twice in a Scene.

name: Ice Face
effect:
Static
Keywords - Innate
Effect: The user has two sets of base stats; Ice Face and Noice Face. The Hit Points of both forms must be the same. When the user is in Ice Face Form and is reduced to half Maximum Hit Points or lower, it changes to Noice Form. The user returns to Ice Form while outside of combat if above half Maximum Hit Points.
Bonus: The user begins the battle with two Ticks of Temporary Hit Points. If the user starts their turn in Snowy or Rainy Weather then they gain a Tick of Temporary Hit Points.

name: Ice Shield
effect:
Scene - Standard Action
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user or an Adjacent Ally are hit with an Attack
Effect: The user and all Adjacent Allies are instead not hit by the triggering Attack, do not take any damage, and are not affected by any of the triggering Attack's effects. 
Bonus: As a Swift Action, the user may choose up to 2 Adjacent Spaces to create [Breakable - Dense] Blocking Terrain in.

name: Illuminate
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Connection - Flash. 
Effect: Attacks that Target the user have a penalty to Accuracy against them equal to your Tier Level (Doesn’t apply to other Targets). This penalty is doubled if the Attacker is adjacent to the user. This does not affect attackers with the Blindsense Capability.

name: Illusion
effect:
Scene - Free Action
Trigger - A Scene starts
Target - A Combatant within 10m
Connection - Double Team
Effect: The user gains an Illusion Coat. While they have an Illusion Coat, they may take the appearance of the Target. Any Combatant who fails an Intuition or Perception Check opposed by your Guile or Stealth will treat you as if you were that Target. Whenever you take Damage, the Illusion Coat is expended. *Grants Illusionist
Bonus: If the user has a Double Team Coat, they may destroy their Illusion Coat to use the Effects of the Double Team Coat without expending an activation.

name: Imposter
effect:
Scene - Free Action
Keywords - Innate
Effect: If the user is not Transformed, they may trigger Imposter to use Transform as a Free Action.

name: Infiltrator
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action + Reaction
Effect: Until the start of their next Turn, the user becomes Untargetable. Enemies ignore this Effect while they're within 3m of the user.
Bonus: The user ignores the Effects of Hazards and Terrain they move through.

name: Ink Spray
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - You hit an Enemy with an Adjacent Attack or a Poison Type Attack
Effect: All Targets hit by the Triggering Attack gain an Ink Coat. Enemies with an Ink Coat have a penalty to Accuracy equal to your Tier Level. Ink Coats may be removed as a Swift+Movement Action.
Bonus: The user's Poison Type Attacks have a 15+ Effect Range to cause Targets hit by the Attack to gain an Ink Coat.

name: Innards Out
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a Damaging Attack
Effect: The user resists the triggering attack one step further. After the attack is resolved, an Enemy within 2 meters loses Hit Points equal to twice the amount of Hit Points lost by the user from the triggering attack, even if the triggering attack caused the user to Faint.

name: Inner Focus
effect:
Static
Effect: The user has a bonus to Save Checks equal to their Tier Level. The user may perform a Respite Maneuver as a Standard Action, ignoring the negative effects of the Maneuver and they may instead choose two of the effects to apply. These negative effects include being unable to use it while there are enemies within 3m, having their positive CS set to default value, and becoming Vulnerable.

name: Interference
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - An Enemy within 3m would perform a Save Check or Accuracy Roll
Effect: The Enemy has a penalty to the Triggering roll equal to your Tier Level.
Bonus: The user may perform Hinder Maneuvers as if they were 5, 1 Target and may use their Focus Skill when making opposed checks.

name: Intimidate
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - An Enemy ends their Turn within 3m of you
Effect: The Triggering Enemy loses -1 CS in Attack or Special Attack of your choice. If they ended their Turn Adjacent to the user, they instead lose -2 CS in Attack or Special Attack.

name: Iron Barbs
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - An Enemy Targets the user with an Attack while Adjacent to them
Effect: The Triggering Enemy becomes Wounded. If they’re already Wounded, they lose a Tick of Hit Points and cannot cure it during their next Save Check. 
Bonus: The user’s Melee Attacks have a 16+ Effect Range to cause the Target to lose a Tick of Hit Points.

name: Iron Body
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a Damaging Attack
Effect: When calculating type effectiveness, the user is treated as only Steel Typed. 
Bonus: The user gains +2 DB to Steel Type Damaging Attacks. (This is not STAB)

name: Iron Fist
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - You use a Melee, 1 Target Attack
Effect: The Target cannot apply Physical Evasion against the Triggering Attack.
Bonus: The user gains +3 DB to Attacks with the Punch Keyword.

name: Ionic Charge
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Trigger - The user hits with an Electric Type Attack
Effect: All Targets hit by the Triggering Attack lose -1 CS in two Stats of the user’s choice or an Ally within 3m gains +1 CS to a Stat of the user’s choice. 
Bonus: While the Weather is Thunderstorm, the user has a bonus to Save Checks equal to their Tier Level.

name: Juicy Energy
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Target - The user or an Adjacent Ally
Effect: The Target gains a Tick of Temporary Hit Points. Temporary Hit Points gained this way stack on top of existing Temporary Hit Points. Juicy Energy may only be used once per Turn.

name: Kampfgeist
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - The user is hit with an Attack or the user causes an Enemy to Faint
Effect: The user’s Attack is set to +6 CS until the end of the next Round and you become Vulnerable for the same duration. After this Duration expires, you are set back to your Default Attack CS. 
Bonus: The user gains STAB on Fighting Type Attacks.

name: Keen Eye
effect:
Static
Effect: The user’s Accuracy cannot be lowered, their attacks cannot have Accuracy Penalties (Excluding Provoked), and the user ignores any non-stat Evasion. The user gains a bonus to Accuracy equal to their Tier Level.

name: Keystone Warp
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Effect: The user may place an Odd Keystone Hazard in any adjacent Space or expend all Soul Charges in an adjacent Odd Keystone Hazard to restore a Tick of HIt Points per Charge. 
Bonus: The user gains the Teleporter Capability, but can only use it to teleport to a space with an Odd Keystone Hazard occupying it. The user may originate any Dark or Ghost Type Attacks from an Odd Keystone Hazard. Whenever a Combatant faints, all Odd Keystones within 5m of them gain Xd3 Soul Charges, where X is equal to your Tier Level.

name: Klutz
effect:
Scene x2 – Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is Hit by a Burst, Blast, or Line Attack.
Effect: The user may Slide 1m, and then become Tripped. This Ability cannot be used if the user is Slowed, Grappled, or otherwise impaired from moving. This ability lets the user avoid Bursts, Blasts, or Lines if the movement removes them from the area of effect.

name: Lancer
effect:
Static
Effect: All of the user’s Melee Attacks gain the Pass Keyword. Whenever the user activates the Pass Keyword, the Attack gains a bonus to Critical Hit Ranges equal to their Tier Level. Whenever the user ends their Turn without using a Movement Action, they gain Damage Reduction equal to their Tier Value until the start of their next Turn.

name: Lateral Senses
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: Attacks that Target the user have a penalty to Accuracy against them equal to your Tier Level (Doesn’t apply to other Targets). If the user is Water Type, they gain Evasion equal to their Tier Level if they’re under 50% or in Rainy Weather. If the user has the Blindsense Capability, they gain Evasion equal to their Tier Level if they’re under 50% or in Low Lighting.

name: Leaf Guard
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user gains a Leafy Coat. While the user has a Leafy Coat, they’re treated as being only grass Typed and they have Damage Reduction equal to their Tier Value.. After an Attack resolves where the user takes Super Effective Damage or a Critical Hit, they must pass a DC 15 Save Check or else the Leafy Coat is expended.

name: Legionnaire
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Keywords - Innate
Effect: Choose an effect below which persists until the start of your next Turn.
■ Tetsudo Formation - The user has Damage Reduction equal to their Tier Value against non-Adjacent Attacks.
■ Phalanx Formation - Choose up to 5 Unoccupied Spaces that are contiguous with the one the user is occupying. The user is considered to occupy all of these spaces and Enemies treat them as Blocking Terrain. 
■ Corona Formation - An Adjacent Enemy becomes Trapped. They cannot Target any Ally more than 3m away from you while Trapped.
■ Orbis Formation - The user cannot be Flanked or Surrounded. The user and Adjacent Allies have bonus Evasion equal to your Tier Level.

name: Levitate
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - A Round Starts
Effect: You may use the Flier Capability as a Free Action.
Bonus: When using the Flier Capability, the user does not become Grounded at the end of their Turn. While Airborne, the user is Immune to Ground Type and Groundsource Attacks and has Evasion against non-Adjacent Attacks equal to their Tier Level. *Grants Flier

name: Life Force
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action 
Keywords - Defensive
Target - An Adjacent Enemy that has an Affliction
Effect: The Target loses two Ticks of Hit Points and you gain two Ticks of Temporary Hit Points. 
Bonus: Once per Round as a Swift or Movement Action, the user may restore a Tick of Hit Points.

name: Lightning Kicks
effect:
Scene - Reaction
Trigger - The user is Targeted by an Adjacent Attack
Effect: You may use a "Kick" Attack as a Standard Action against the Triggering Enemy. This Attack resolves before the Triggering Attack. If the Triggering Enemy were to faint, their Attack does not resolve. 
Bonus: The user’s Melee Attacks all gain the Dash Keyword and if Dash is activated, it ignores Speed Evasion.

name: Lingering Aroma
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - An Enemy ends their Turn within 2m of you
Effect: The Triggering Enemy must expend a Reaction or pass a TN 12 Save Check. On a Failure, you may either choose one of their Abilities to become Disabled, or lower one of their Stats by -2 CS. If they got a 3 or less, both apply instead.

name: Liquid Ooze
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - An Enemy ends their Turn Adjacent to the user or hits them with an Attack while Adjacent to them
Effect: The Triggering Enemy becomes Poisoned. If the Trigger was being hit with an Attack and the Triggering Enemy is already Poisoned, they cannot cure the Affliction during their next Save Check.

name: Liquid Voice
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Trigger - The user uses an Attack with the Sonic Keyword as a Standard Action
Effect: The triggering Attack loses the Sonic keyword, but gains the Friendly keyword and becomes Water Typed. If the Attack was a Status Class Attack, you may treat it as a Special Attack with DB 4. This ability may not be used with Perish Song.

name: Long Reach
effect:
Static
Effect: The user may use Damaging Attacks as if they had a range of "6, 1 Target" instead of their usual range. The user's Attack of Opportunity is modified, all mentions of "Adjacent Enemy" becomes "an Enemy within 3m". The final trigger becomes "when an Enemy shifts out of a burst 3 range from the user" rather than moving out of adjacency.

name: Lullaby
effect:
Static
Connection - Sing. 
Effect: Enemies that are Drowsy as a result of the user are Vulnerable while they're Drowsy. While a Drowsy Enemy is within 2m of you, they have a penalty to Save Checks equal to your Tier Level.

name: Magical Surge
effect:
Scene x2 - Free Action
Trigger - The user drops below 50% Hit Points or ends their Turn in Mystical Weather
Effect: The user next Special Attack gains the Smite Keyword
Bonus: While the user is in Mystical Weather, their Special Damaging Attacks have a bonus to Critical Hit Ranges equal to your Tier Level.

name: Magic Bounce
effect:
Scene x2 - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit with a Special Attack and doesn’t faint
Effect: After Damage Calculations, choose an Enemy within 2m to lose Hit Points equal to the amount lost from the Triggering Attack.

name: Magic Guard
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: Whenever the user would lose Hit Points (Excluding Damage), they may subtract their Special Defense from the amount lost first. While the Weather is Mystical, the user gains Damage Reduction equal to their Tier Value against Special Attacks.

name: Magician
effect:
Static
Connection - Snatch. 
Effect: When using Snatch, you may choose to grant the benefits of the Self-Targeting Attack to both you and an ally within 6m. Whenever you hit an Adjacent Enemy with an Attack or Maneuver, you can perform a Disarm Maneuver against them as a Free Action and you may use Focus instead of Combat or Stealth.

name: Magma Armor
effect:
Scene x2 - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - You're hit with a Melee Attack
Effect: The Triggering Enemy becomes Burned after Damage Resolution
Bonus: Whenever you’re hit with a Melee Damaging Attack from a Burned Enemy, you treat the Type Effectiveness as if it were Resisted.

name: Magnet Pull
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Target - A Combatant within 6m
Effect: Pick up to Two Effects;
- The Target Slides X meters. X is up to 6 meters minus the target’s Weight Class.
- If the Target is within 3m of the user, they become Trapped. 
- The Target cannot enter any space within 2m of you until the start of your next Turn.

name: Memory Wipe
effect:
Scene x2 - Special
Target - An Enemy within 3m
Effect: If used as a Swift Action, the last Attack used by the Target becomes Disabled. If used as a Standard Action, the Target becomes Dazed and Paralyzed. *Grants Mind Weaver

name: Mental Assault
effect:
Static
Effect: The user’s Psychic Type Damaging Attacks gain a Effect Range of 17+. When this Effect Range is Triggered, roll a d3. On a 1, all Targets become Dazed. On a 2, all Targets become Enraged. On a 3, all Targets become Suppressed. If an Enemy is suffering from a Mental Affliction, they cannot resist the user’s Special Attacks.

name: Mental Force
effect:
Static
Effect: Whenever the user hits a Special Attack against an Enemy with negative Combat Stages in Special Defense, it cannot be resisted by any means. While the Weather is Mystical, the user’s Dark, Fairy, Ghost and Psychic Type Attacks that are Special Category ignore Defensive Abilities.

name: Migraine
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user inflicts a Mental Affliction
Effect: The Target gains a Migraine Coat while they have the Triggering Affliction.
Bonus: When the user falls below 50% Hit Points or gains a Mental Affliction, they gain a Migraine Coat. Combatants with a Migraine Coat have a Bane to Skill Checks and a penalty to Save Checks equal to your Tier Level. If the user has a Migraine Coat, they also have a bonus to Effect Ranges equal to their Tier Level.

name: Mind's Eye
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Effect: The Target becomes Marked with a Mind Mark. The user ignores the Special Evasion of Enemies with the Mind Mark. The user resists Special Category Attacks by an additional damage step if it derrives from an enemy with their Mind Mark
Bonus: Ghost Types are not Immune to the user’s Normal and Fighting Type Attacks.

name: Mirror Armor
effect:
Scene - Standard Action
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user would be hit by a non-Adjacent Attack
Effect: The triggering Attack instead misses you. In addition, you may Target an Enemy within 2m and perform an Accuracy Roll with the AC being the Triggering Attack as if you had used it. If the Attack would hit, the Target is instead hit by the Triggering Attack as if they were the original Target. 
Bonus: The user’s Defense and Special Defense Combat Stages cannot be lowered.

name: Missile Launch
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Connection – Dragon Darts. 
Effect: Select an unoccupied space within 5m to create a Dreepy Token in. This Dreepy Token cannot move this Turn.  
Bonus: Dreepy Tokens have 1 Hit Point but share the creator’s Evasion and can be targeted with Attacks. Whenever the creator would Move, they may allocate movement to their Tokens for them to move. A Dreepy Token may be destroyed as a Free Action when they move into a space occupied by an Enemy. If they do so, the creator may perform a Dragon Type Basic Attack against that Enemy as a Free Action, ignoring range. When a Dreepy Token would faint, they are destroyed instead.

name: Misty Surge
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Connection - Misty Terrain. 
Effect: You may use Misty Terrain as a Free Action, however it only lasts until the end of the next Round.
Bonus: At the end of the Round, if the Weather is Mystical, you may use a Reaction to gain +1 CS in a Stat of your choice.

name: Mold Breaker
effect:
Static
Effect: You may use your Physical Attacks as if they had the Full Action Keyword. If you do, they are treated as having the Unstoppable Keyword.

name: Molten Ground
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Connection - Fire Wall. 
Effect: During this Turn, whenever the user Moves, all spaces they pass through turn into Fire Hazards (See: Fire Wall).

name: Moody
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - The user gains CS or a positive modifier 
Effect: Roll a d2. On a 2, the user ignores the Trigger and gain a Bad Mood Counter. The user cannot gain more than 2 Bad Mood Counters per Round. 
Bonus: When hitting an Attack, the user may expend 2 Bad Mood Counters to make it become a Critical Hit. After the Attack resolves, they become Enraged. The user cannot expend Bad Mood Counters while Enraged.

name: Mud Dweller
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: The user resists Ground and Water Type Attacks by an additional Damage step. Enemies with a Mud Coat have double the Accuracy Penalty when Targeting the user.

name: Mud Shield
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action 
Target - The user or an Adjacent Ally 
Connection - Mud Sport. 
Effect: The Target gains two Ticks of Temporary Hit Points.While they have Temporary Hit Points from this Ability, they are Immune to Electric Type Damage.
Bonus: The user has Damage Reduction equal to their Tier Value against Attacks from enemies that have a Mud Coat.

name: Multiscale
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
Effect: While the user is at Full Hit Points, they resist all damage by an additional step. While the user has Temporary Hit Points, they have Damage Reduction equal to their Tier Value.

name: Mummy
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by an Attack
Effect: A Random Attack or Ability of the Triggering Enemy is disabled. If the Enemy already has the Disabled Affliction, they may instead become Suppressed or Trapped if they’re within 3m of the user.

name: Mycelium Might
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Effect: Choose 6 Spaces within 6m to create Mycelium Hazards in, such that all 6 Spaces are Adjacent to at least one other Mycelium Hazard. Mycelium Hazards are treated as Slow Terrain. Any Enemy that passes through a Mycelium Hazard loses a Tick of Hit Points, then the user gains a Tick of Hit Points or a Temporary Tick of Hit Points. If the user faints or is recalled, all Mycelium Hazards are destroyed.

name: Mysticism
effect:
Static
Keywords - Innate
Effect: The user adds +5 Points to their Special Defense Stat in the Extras Column. When the user reaches Level 20 and every interval after that (20, 40, etc) they gain an additional +5. If the user is a Trainer, the Level Intervals are Level 4, 8, 12, 16, then 20. The user may use their Special Stat Evasion instead of Defense when Targeted by a Physical Attack if desired.

name: Mystic Mist
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Effect: The Weather becomes Mystical. 
Bonus: While the Weather is Mystical, the user has a bonus to Save Checks equal to their Tier Level and has a Boon to all Skill Checks while in Combat.

name: Mystic Veil
effect:
Scene x2 - Free Action
Trigger - An Ally ends their turn within 2m of the user.
Effect: The Triggering Ally regains a tick of hit points.
Bonus: The user and allies within 2m of the user have a bonus to Save Checks equal to their Tier Level.

name: Natural Cure
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: The user is cured of all Physical Status Afflictions they have.
Bonus: The user has a bonus to Save Checks equal to double their Tier Level if they have a Physical Affliction.

name: Natural Regality
effect:
Scene - Free Action
Trigger - The user hits with a Grass Type Attack
Effect: After the Triggering Attack resolves, choose a Manipulate Maneuver to use on all Targets hit by the Triggering Attack. The Maneuver automatically hits. 
Bonus: While the Weather is Sunny, the user's Combat Stages cannot be lowered below their Default CS Value.

name: Needles
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a Melee Attack or hits a Melee Attack
Effect: After the Trigger resolves, the Triggering Enemy or the Target, respectively, lose a Tick of Hit Points and gains a Needles Coat. While an Enemy has a Needles Coat, all Melee Attacks that hit them have a bonus to Damage Rolls equal to your Tier Value. The Needles coat can be removed as a Movement Action.

name: Neutralizing Gas
effect:
Static
Effect: Enemy Abilities have no Effect while the user is Adjacent to them. If the user is Tier 3, this instead applies to Enemies within 2m of the user. If the user causes an Enemy to become Poisoned, their Abilities have no Effect while they are Poisoned this way.

name: Nightfall
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Effect: The Weather becomes Foggy. 
Bonus: While the Weather is Foggy, the user has a bonus to Save Checks equal to their Tier Level and has a Boon to all Skill Checks while in Combat.

name: Nimble Strikes
effect:
Static
Effect: The user may add half of their Speed Stat to the Damage Rolls of their Physical Normal Type Attacks or may use their Speed Stat instead of Attack as the Offensive Stat for them. Whenever the user uses Melee Normal Type Attacks, the Target cannot apply Speed Evasion against them.

name: No Guard
effect:
Static
Effect: The user’s Melee Attacks ignore all Stat Evasion of their Targets. The user has a -3 penalty to Evasion.

name: Odious Spray
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user hits with a Poison-Type Attack.
Connection - Poison Gas. 
Effect: The user creates Gas Hazards in a Ranged Blast 3 centered on one Target of the Attack. Enemies that Trigger this Hazard become Weakened until the end of their next Turn and Poisoned.
Bonus: The user may create a 2x2 Zone within 3m as a Standard Action. This Zone is filled with Gas Hazards that cause those who Trigger it to become Weakened until the end of the next Round and Poisoned.

name: Omen
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Target - An Enemy within 5m
Effect: The Target gains an Ominous Coat. When a Combatant with an Ominous Coat misses an Attack or fails a Save Check, the Coat is expended and they become Cursed. A Combatant can only be Cursed this way once per Scene.
Bonus: The user’s Dark and Ghost Type Attacks used as a Standard Action have a 17+ Effect Range of causing the Target to gain an Ominous Coat.

name: Opportunist
effect:
Scene x2 - Reaction
Trigger - An Enemy within 5m increases their Combat Stages
Effect: The user increases their Combat Stages for the same Stat by the amount increased by the Triggering Combatant
Bonus: When the user performs an Attack of Opportunity, they may use an At-Will damaging Attack instead of a Basic Attack so long as the only Target is the Triggering Enemy.

name: Pack Hunt
effect:
Static
Effect: The user’s Attack of Opportunity can also be triggered when an Adjacent Enemy is hit by a non-Basic Attack from an Ally who is also Adjacent to that Enemy. An Attack of Opportunity can only be Triggered by you this way once per Round. Whenever you Trigger an Attack of Opportunity, you may choose for them to lose a Tick of Hit Points instead of performing a Damage Roll.

name: Parasitic Drain
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user hits with an Adjacent Attack
Effect: The Attack is treated as having the Drain Keyword. If the user is at Full Hit Points, they instead gain Temporary Hit Points equal to the value they would have gained.

name: Parry
effect:
Scene x2 - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit with an Attack from an Adjacent Enemy
Effect: The user resists the Attack by an additional Damage step. After this Ability resolves, the user may perform a Melee Attack as if it had the Priority and Sureshot Keyword but it must only be against the Triggering Enemy.

name: Perish Body
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by an Attack from an Enemy within 3m
Effect: The Triggering Enemy loses -1 Perish Counter or gains a Perish Coat, then they lose a Tick of Hit Points.
Bonus: Whenever an Enemy ends their Turn within 3m of the user, they gain a Perish Coat with 3 Perish Counters or they lose -1 Perish Counter. Whenever an Enemy has 0 Perish Counters left, you may choose to expend their Perish Coat and they’re set to 0 Hit Points. Whenever an Enemy is set to 0 this way, the user loses 5 Ticks of Hit Points.

name: Pickpocket
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - The user hits an Adjacent Enemy with an Attack
Effect: The user may either perform a Disarm Maneuver against the Target of the Triggering Attack as a Free Action, or have them lose -1 CS in a Stat they have Positive CS in. If they lose CS via this Ability, the user gains +1 CS in the same Stat.

name: Piercing Vision
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Trigger - The user makes an Accuracy Check
Effect: The user rolls twice, keeping the better result
Bonus: The user’s Accuracy cannot be lowered, their attacks cannot have Accuracy Penalties, and the user ignores any non-stat Evasion. This ability does not ignore accuracy penalties from the Provoked Condition.

name: Poison Point
effect:
Static
Effect: The user’s Melee Attacks that do not have a Poisoned Effect Range gain one at 17+. The user's Poison Effect Ranges (Excluding the one granted by Poison Point) are increased by +2. The user’s Melee Attacks have a bonus to Critical Hit Range equal to your Tier Level if the Target is Poisoned.

name: Pollen Bomb
effect:
At-Will - Special
Effect: Choose a Grass Type Damaging Attack on your Battle Attack List, then choose a space within 3m to create a Pollen Bomb Hazard. At the end of the next round, the Pollen Bomb Hazard is destroyed and the chosen Attack is used as a Free Action with its Range being a 3x3 Zone, centered on the Hazard and ignoring Frequency. This Ability costs a Swift Action to use as worded, but you may use it as a Full Action to create three Hazards instead and the range can be up to 6m. 
Note: If an Enemy would be hit by multiple Pollen Bombs at once, instead of applying the attack multiple times against them, it automatically hits but only applies once.

name: Poltergeist
effect:
Static
Keywords - Defensive
