Effect: Rotom gains an Immunity to a Type of Damage depending on what Form it has taken. When using the Form Change Capability it may change to the form of its currently possessed item or back to Standard Rotom. These different forms may have different Battle Attack Lists. 

Standard Rotom: Ground
Rotom Heat: Fire
Rotom Wash: Water 
Rotom Frost: Ice 
Rotom Fan: Flying
Rotom Mow: Grass

name: Polycephaly
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Trigger - The user performs a Damaging X-Target Attack
Effect: The Attack's Range is increased by +1 Target. If it misses all Targets, this Ability's Frequency is not expended.
Bonus: The user's Basic Attacks gain the Double Strike Keyword.

name: Power of Alchemy
effect:
Scene x2 - Free Action
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user hits a Melee Attack or is hit by a Melee Attack
Effect: Choose a non-Innate Ability that the Triggering Enemy or Target has. You learn that Ability until the end of the Scene or until you Faint or the Ability becomes Disabled. You cannot learn unique boss abilities this way.

name: Power Spot
effect:
At-Will - Swift + Movement Action
Effect: Create a 3x3 Zone, centered on the user. Allies within this Zone gain a bonus to Damage Rolls equal to your Tier Value and a bonus to Accuracy equal to your Tier Level. When you Faint or gain a Mental Affliction, this Zone is removed. 
Bonus: Adjacent Allies gain these bonuses as well unless they're within this Zone.

name: Prankster
effect:
Static
Effect: The user may use Status Attacks as Priority. This cannot be used if the Status Attack would use an Action other than Standard Action.

name: Pressure
effect:
At-Will - Free Action
Trigger - An Enemy ends their Turn within 3m of you
Effect: The Triggering Enemy performs a TN 5 Save Check. On a failure, they become Suppressed. If they’re Adjacent, increase the TN by +5. If the user is Tier 3, increase the TN by +5. An Enemy can only become Suppressed this way once per Scene.
Bonus: The user’s Damaging Attacks cause Targets to become Suppressed on a 18+

name: Pride
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - The user is hit by an Attack or gains a Mental Affliction
Effect: After the Attack resolves, the user gains +1 CS in Special Attack or Special Defense.
Bonus: While the user has a Mental Affliction, they have a bonus to Damage Rolls equal to their Tier Value.

name: Primal Drum
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Effect: The Range of the user's next Grass Type or Groundsource Attack may be changed to your choice of Burst 2; 6, 2, Targets, or Line 8. 
Bonus: The user's Groundsource Attacks gain the Smite Keyword.

name: Probability Control
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - You or an Ally roll a d20
Effect: The Triggering d20’s result is replaced with your Stored d20’s value.
Bonus: As a Swift Action, you may roll a d20 and note its result. It becomes your Stored d20 Value. When you use Probability control, you no longer have a Stored d20 Value. If you use this Bonus Effect while you have a Stored d20 Value unused, it may replace the value with the new d20 result.

name: Protean
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Trigger - The user uses an Attack.
Effect: Before the Attack is performed, the user’s Type(s) changes to match the Type of the triggering Attack. The user returns to their original type(s)(or lack thereof) at the end of the Scene.

name: Psychic Surge
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Connection - Psychic Terrain. 
Effect: You may use Psychic Terrain as a Free Action, however it only lasts until the end of the next Round.
Bonus: At the end of the Round, if the Weather is Mystical, you may use a Reaction to gain +1 CS in a Stat of your choice.

name: Punk Rock
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Trigger - The user uses a Status Class Attack with the Sonic Keyword as a Standard Action
Effect: The Attack is treated as a Special Attack with a Damage Base of 6 that cannot be modified. Its effects remain the same.  
Bonus: The user gains +3 DB to damaging attacks with the Sonic keyword.

name: Pure Flame
effect:
Static
Effect: While the user is Enraged, under 50% Max Hit Points or in Sunny Weather, their Fire Type Attacks have the following Modifiers. If it's Range is Blast, Burst or Line Range, it is increased by +1. Their Critical Hit and Effect Ranges are increased by your Tier Level. This bonus does not stack if multiple conditions are fulfilled.

name: Queenly Majesty
effect:
Scene x2 - Swift Action
Trigger - The user would perform a Save Check
Effect: The user automatically passes this Save Check without needing to roll. 
Bonus: After Queenly Majesty is used, the user’s next Damaging Attack gains the Smite Keyword.

name: Quick Cloak
effect:
At-Will - Extended Action
Keywords - Innate
Effect: Burmy gathers materials from the nearby Terrain and creates a Cloak for Itself. The Forest or Grasslands Terrain gives it a Plant Cloak (Grass). Desert, Cave or Mountain Terrain give it a Sandy Cloak (Ground). Urban Terrain gives it Trash Cloak (Steel). While in a Cloak, Burmy gains the Type associated with the Cloak as a secondary Typing, which becomes permanent upon evolution into a Wormadam.

name: Quick Curl
effect:
Scene x2 - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by an Attack.
Connection - Defense Curl. 
Effect: Before the Attack's Damage Roll, the user may use Defense Curl as a Free Action, then gain Damage Reduction equal to your Tier Value until the start of your next Turn. If the user has a Rolled Coat, they gain an extra +5 DR per Counter they have for the same duration.

name: Radiant Beam
effect:
Static
Effect: The user may use Grass Type Damaging Attacks as if they had the Range of “Line X”. X is equal to 4 plus the number of Positive Combat Stages in their corresponding Offensive Stat. If the Weather is Sunny, Attacks used this way gain the Smite Keyword as well.

name: Ragelope
effect:
Static
Effect: The user's Physical Attacks gain the following Effect Range: On 18+, the user gains +1 CS in either Attack or Speed. While the user is Enraged this Effect Range is changed to 15+. Whenever the user gains a Status Affliction, they may become Enraged.

name: Raging Inferno
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Trigger - The user is hit by an Attack
Effect: The user's Fire Type Damaging Attacks have their DB increased by +2 until the end of the Scene, then, if not already, the user becomes Enraged.
Bonus: While the user is Enraged, the user's Fire Type Damaging Attacks have the Smite Keyword and have all Area of Effect Ranges increased by +1.

name: Rain Dish
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: The user restores two Ticks of Hit Points or gains 2 Ticks of Temporary Hit Points or is cured of a Physical Status Affliction. If the user is in Rainy Weather, the Frequency of Rain Dish isn’t expended. This Ability can only ignore its Frequency twice in a Scene.

name: Rally
effect:
At-Will - Swift Action
Target - An Ally within 5m
Effect: The Target gains a Tick of Temporary Hit Points. If the Target is Dazed, Enraged, Entranced or Provoked they may roll a DC 15 Save Check and if they pass, they may cure one of those Afflictions or Conditions.

name: Razor Edge
effect:
Static
Connection - Poison Tail. The user gains a bonus to Critical Hit Ranges equal to their Tier Level. When using an Attack with “Tail” in its name, they have a Bonus to Damage Rolls equal to your Tier Value.

name: Reckless
effect:
At-Will - Free Action 
Effect: During this Turn you ignore Physical and Special Evasion on all Targets. The next Attack you're Targeted by treats you as if you were Vulnerable.
Bonus: The user gains +3 DB to Attacks with the Recoil or Reckless Keyword

name: Refreshing Veil
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Target - An Ally within 5m
Connection - Aqua Ring. 
Effect: The Target is cured of all Physical Afflictions. If the Target is affected by an Aqua Ring Coat, this Frequency is not expended, however they cannot be Targeted by Refreshing Veil for the remainder of the Scene. 
Bonus: While the Weather is Rainy, the user and all allies within 2m have a bonus to Save Checks equal to your Tier Level.

name: Regal Challenge
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Effect: Ask each Enemy within 5m if they will show Deference or Defiance. If a Combatant chooses Deference, they cannot Attack the user on their next turn (Ignoring Provoked), then lose -2 CS in a Stat of the user's Choice. If they choose Defiance, they become Provoked by the user until the end of their next Turn.

name: Regenerator
effect:
At-Will - Reaction
Keywords - Defensive
Trigger - The user is hit by a Damaging Attack and doesn't Faint
Effect: After Damage Resolution, the user restores a Tick of Hit Points.
Special: If the user was under 50% Hit Points when the Triggering Attack occurred, this may be used as a Free Action instead.

name: Reliquary
effect:
Scene x2 - Free Action
Effect: The user may choose an Attack from their Known Attack List and use it as a Standard Action, as if it was on their Current Attack List.
Bonus: The user gains bonus Attack Slots equal to their Tier Level. Attacks that occupy these Slots must be Status Category.

name: Rip and Tear
effect:
Scene - Swift Action
Trigger - The user hits with an Attack with the Bite Keyword
Effect: The user may either Initiate a Grapple Maneuver as a Free Action against the Target or cause them to become Wounded. 
Bonus: The user gains +3 DB to Attacks with the Bite Keyword.

name: Retribution

name: Rock Head
effect:
Static

name: Rocket
effect:

At the end of the next Round, these Hazards explode, causing enemies within 2m to lose a Tick of Hit Points. 
Bonus: The user gains STAB on Rock Type Attacks if they're a Pokémon.

name: Root Down

At-Will - Movement Action
Keywords - Defensive

name: Rough Skin

Static

Static

Static

Scene – Reaction

name: Sand Stream

At-Will - Swift Action

Static

Scene - Swift Action

The user cannot gain Temporary Hit Points from other sources while in Schooling Forme. When the user is below half Maximum Hit Points and has no Temporary Hit Points left, they change back into Solo Forme. If the user would not be able to fit in the space around it at the end of this Ability, this Ability cannot be used.
